name: Manny Wolfe
seeking: JV partnerships with speaking bureaus and event organizers needing outbound booking systems. Affiliate relationships with CRM and lead generation tools for speakers. Co-created speaking business programs with complementary visibility and marketing experts.

service_provided: public speaking coaching, marketing strategy, business growth consulting
social_proof: Built multiple 6 and 7-figure businesses, author, speaker, helped numerous entrepreneurs grow their customer base and sales.
